<content>1: # Plan: Fix Lesson Completion Redirect to Old Display Page
2: 
3: **Task ID**: 260316-auto-877
4: **Task Type**: fix_bug
5: **Spec Reference**: Issue #851
6: 
7: ## Rerun Context
8: 
9: This is a fix rerun. No previous plan/build/review artifacts exist in `prev-run/`. This is effectively a fresh plan.
10: 
11: ## Research Findings
12: 
13: - ✅ `src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/chapters/[chapterSlug]/lessons/[lessonSlug]/page.tsx` — Lesson page, sets `backUrl` (line 107)
14: - ✅ `src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/chapters/[chapterSlug]/lessons/[lessonSlug]/_components/ExercisesPager/index.tsx` — Pager component with "Finish" button on outro screen

17: - ✅ `src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/chapters/[chapterSlug]/lessons/[lessonSlug]/complete/page.tsx` — Complete page, sets `backUrl` (line 81)
18: - ✅ `src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/chapters/[chapterSlug]/lessons/[lessonSlug]/complete/CompleteContent.tsx` — Complete UI component
19: - ✅ `src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/chapters/[chapterSlug]/page.tsx` — Chapter page (OLD display: basic lesson list)
20: - ✅ `src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/page.tsx` — Course page (NEW display: tabbed Learn/Practice/Ask/Exams)
21: - ✅ `src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/_components/CoursePageContent/index.tsx` — New course page with tabs
22: - ✅ `src/app/(frontend)/courses/[courseSlug]/_components/CourseLessonCard/index.tsx` — New lesson cards linking to `/courses/X/chapters/Y/lessons/Z`
23: - 🆕 `tests/unit/exercises-pager-back-url.test.ts` — New test for back URL behavior
24: 
25: ### Patterns Observed
26: 
27: - Navigation URLs are hardcoded string templates with route params
28: - `backUrl` is computed at the server page level and passed down as a prop
29: - Three places compute `backUrl` for lesson navigation: lesson page, exercise page, complete page
30: - The **course page** (`/courses/X`) is the modern tabbed UI (Learn/Practice/Ask/Exams)
31: - The **chapter page** (`/courses/X/chapters/Y`) is the older list view with breadcrumbs
32: - All lesson cards on the course page link directly to `/courses/X/chapters/Y/lessons/Z` (bypassing the chapter page)
33: 
34: ### Integration Points
35: 
36: - `ExercisesPager` receives `backUrl` as a prop — used in the "Finish" button on the outro screen
37: - `ExerciseWorkspace` receives `backUrl` as a prop — used in the `ExerciseHeader` back button
38: - `CompleteContent` receives `backUrl` as a prop — used in the "Back" buttons
39: 
40: ## Root Cause Analysis
41: 
42: When a student completes an interactive lesson via the `ExercisesPager`, clicking the "Finish" button on the outro screen navigates to `backUrl`. This URL is computed differently depending on entry point:
43: 
44: | Entry Point | `backUrl` Value | Destination |
45: |---|---|---|
46: | Lesson page (`/courses/X/chapters/Y/lessons/Z`) | `/courses/X/chapters/Y` | **Chapter page** (OLD view) |
47: | Exercise page (`/courses/X/chapters/Y/lessons/Z/exercises/E`) | `/courses/X/chapters/Y/lessons/Z` | Lesson page (loops back) |
48: | Complete page (`/courses/X/chapters/Y/lessons/Z/complete`) | `/courses/X/chapters/Y/lessons/Z` | Lesson page (loops back) |
49: 
50: The **lesson page** sets `backUrl` to the chapter page (`/courses/${courseSlug}/chapters/${chapterSlug}`) on line 107. The chapter page shows a basic list of lessons — this is the "old display/view page" referenced in the bug report.
51: 
52: The **expected behavior** is that after completing a lesson, the "Finish" button should navigate to the **course page** (`/courses/${courseSlug}`) which is the modern tabbed view where lessons are listed by chapter. This is the "current/new display page" the user expects.
53: 
54: The `CourseLessonCard` on the course page links directly to lessons via `/courses/X/chapters/Y/lessons/Z`, so users arrive at lessons FROM the course page. The "Finish" button should take them BACK to the course page, not to an intermediate chapter page they never visited.
55: 
56: ## Reuse Inventory
57: 
58: - No new utilities needed
59: - Existing `SystemLink` component — already in use ✅
60: - Existing `ExercisesPager` patterns — will be modified ✅

### Bug Fix Summary

**Issue**: After completing an interactive lesson, clicking "Finish" redirected to the old chapter page (list view) instead of the new course page (modern tabbed interface).

**Fix**: Changed `backUrl` from `/courses/{courseSlug}/chapters/{chapterSlug}` to `/courses/{courseSlug}` in all three entry points.

**Result**: Users are now redirected to the modern course page after completing a lesson.
